name: Default BBCode Table Review
description: Template-driven BBCode table review layout with structured ratings, notes, and summary.

rating_options.name: N/A
rating_options.description: Not applicable: Not necessary or relevant, nothing to rate. ( e.g., No communication necessary )

rating_options.name: Failure
rating_options.description: Unacceptable: Major problem(s), item/service fundamentally broken or missing.

rating_options.name: Poor
rating_options.description: Clearly inadequate: Multiple problems, heavy user effort required to recover.

rating_options.name: Basic
rating_options.description: Bare minimum: Functional but obvious shortcomings and friction.

rating_options.name: Adequate
rating_options.description: Baseline: Solid, reliable, meets reasonable expectations. No surprises.

rating_options.name: Strong
rating_options.description: Above average: Thoughtful implementation and noticeable quality.

rating_options.name: Advanced
rating_options.description: High-end: Professional, well thought-out execution, refined, with extra effort/skill shown.

rating_options.name: Exceptional
rating_options.description: Exemplary: Stands out, elite-level, rare to encounter. Exceeds expectations in a way that impresses.

body:
[table]
[tr]
[th][subtitle][center] VENDOR NAME [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] PRODUCT [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] MARKET [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td][subtitle][center] /u/{{ vendor_name }} [/center][/subtitle][/td]
[td][subtitle][center] {{ product_name }} [/center][/subtitle][/td]
[td][subtitle][center] /d/{{ market }} [/center][/subtitle][/td]
[/tr]
[/table]
[table]
[tr]
[th][subtitle][center] PRODUCT DETAILS [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] VALUE/RATING [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] NOTES [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Order [/td]
[td][center] {{ order_type }} – {{ quantity }} [/center][/td]
[td] - [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Listing Type [/td]
[td][center] {{ listing_type }} [/center][/td]
[td] - [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Price [/td]
[td][center] {{ price }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ shipping_cost }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Price Value [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.price_value }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.price_value }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Reagent Test [/td]
[td][center] {{ test_result }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ test_notes }}{% if test_link %}
[url={{ test_link }}]Reagent Test Results[/url]{% endif %}[/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Quantity Rating [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.quantity }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.quantity }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Quality/Potency Rating [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.quality }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.quality }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Aesthetic [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.aesthetic }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.aesthetic }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Picture Link [/td]
[td][center]{% if picture_album_url %}[url={{ picture_album_url }}]{{ album_name or "Pictures" }}[/url]{% else %}-{% endif %}[/center][/td]
[td] - [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Overall Product Rating [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.overall_product }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.overall_product }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[th][subtitle][center] SHIPPING [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] RATING [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] NOTES [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Shipping Option [/td]
[td][center] - [/center][/td]
[td] {{ shipping_method }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Shipping Time [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.shipping_time }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.shipping_time }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Stealth Quality [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.packaging }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.packaging }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Overall Shipping Rating [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.overall_shipping }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.overall_shipping }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[th][subtitle][center] CUSTOMER SERVICE [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] RATING [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[th][subtitle][center] NOTES [/center][/subtitle][/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Clear Sales Terms [/td]
[td][center] {{ clear_sales_terms }} [/center][/td]
[td] - [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Friendliness [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.friendliness }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.friendliness }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Professionalism [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.professionalism }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.professionalism }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Response Time [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.response_time }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.response_time }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Overall Customer Service Rating [/td]
[td][center] {{ rating.overall_customer_service }} [/center][/td]
[td] {{ comment.overall_customer_service }} [/td]
[/tr]
[tr]
[th] SUMMARY [/th]
[th] FINAL REVIEW [/th]
[th] NOTES [/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[td] Final Summary [/td]
[td] {{ final_summary }} [/td]
[td] - [/td]
[/tr]
[/table]

standard.na: Not applicable: Not necessary or relevant, nothing to rate. ( e.g., No communication necessary )
standard.1: Unacceptable: Major problem(s), item/service fundamentally broken or missing.
standard.2: Clearly inadequate: Multiple problems, heavy user effort required to recover.
standard.3: Bare minimum: Functional but obvious shortcomings and friction.
standard.4: Baseline: Solid, reliable, meets reasonable expectations. No surprises.
standard.5: Above average: Thoughtful implementation and noticeable quality.
standard.6: High-end: Professional, well thought-out execution, refined, with extra effort/skill shown.
standard.7: Exemplary: Stands out, elite-level, rare to encounter. Exceeds expectations in a way that impresses.

stealth.1: Broken, missing, or exposed product. Might as well have shipped it with a label saying “Drugs Inside”.
stealth.2: Flimsy packaging, contents obvious with light handling. Noticeable smell, shape, or other obvious characteristic.
stealth.3: Simple container inside packaging. Contents intact, but easy to guess.
stealth.4: Sealed vacuum/Mylar + some padding/inner packaging. Passes casual inspection.
stealth.5: Multiple protective layers. No smell, rattling, or obvious signs.
stealth.6: Includes some form of obfuscation/decoy/disguise. Hard to detect even if opened.
stealth.7: “Where the fuck are my drugs??” level stealth. Multiple layers + obfuscation, hidden even under scrutiny.
stealth.na: Not applicable: Not necessary or relevant, nothing to rate. ( e.g., No communication necessary )
